task.title: How to Store Halloween Decorations After Use
task.shortdesc: This task explains how to store Halloween decorations after the holiday to keep them organized and in good condition for future use.

prereq.p: Before you begin, make sure you have:

context.p: Proper storage of Halloween decorations helps prevent damage, reduces clutter, and makes decorations easier to find next year.

step.cmd: Remove decorations from their display locations.

info.p: Remove dirt, dust, or residue before storage.

stepxmp.p: Wipe plastic decorations with a dry cloth and allow any damp items to dry completely.

step.cmd: Sort decorations by type or location.

info.p: Grouping similar items makes future setup easier.

step.cmd: Store containers in a dry, secure location.

result.p: Halloween decorations are safely stored and ready for reuse.

postreq.p: Dispose of damaged or unwanted decorations responsibly.
